conflict: Fear, desire, and marital vows collide while both husbands are absent.
consequence: Elsie and Noreen become physically intimate, creating a new relational center that cannot be undone.
must_land_beats: Power fails and both households consolidate around one fire
Physical comfort shifts into deliberate intimacy with clear mutual consent
Afterward both women understand the act as consequential, not accidental
objective: Survive a full-night blackout without panic.
